zh.Drayton, Leicestershire, England: 英國萊希斯特斯爾德雷頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Knightly III Of Fawsley於大約1427年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾法福斯利時，他的父親Richard Knightley Of Fawsley33歲，母親Elizabeth Purefoy29歲。他於1440年12月1日與Eleanor de Throckmorton在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾羅雅爾 利阿明頓 斯帕聖 約翰 馮 巴普迪斯也斯 邱奇結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1476年6月19日在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾法福斯利享年50歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾法福斯利。

nameMeanings.name: Knightly
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Middlesex and Cambridgeshire): variant of Knightley, a habitational name from Knightley in Gnosall (Staffordshire). The placename derives from Old English cniht ‘knight, young man, retainer’ (genitive plural cnihta) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This is the usual spelling of the name in Ireland, where it has been establishes since the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Knightly III Of Fawsley was born about 1427, in Fawsley, Northamptonshire, England, his father, Richard Knightley Of Fawsley, was 33 and his mother, Elizabeth Purefoy, was 29. He married Eleanor de Throckmorton on 1 December 1440, in St John The Baptist's Church, Royal Leamington Spa, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 19 June 1476, in Fawsley, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50, and was buried in Fawsley, Northamptonshire, England.

Il a épousé Eleanor de Throckmorton le 1 décembre 1440, à St John The Baptist's Church, Royal Leamington Spa, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 19 juin 1476, à Fawsley, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Fawsley, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

Er hat am 1. Dezember 1440 in St John The Baptist's Church, Royal Leamington Spa, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom Eleanor de Throckmorton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 19. Lui sposato Eleanor de Throckmorton il 1 dicembre 1440, nel St John The Baptist's Church, Royal Leamington Spa, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Richard Knightly III Of Fawsleyが約1427年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアファウスリーで生まれた時，父Richard Knightley Of Fawsleyは33歳，母Elizabeth Purefoyは29歳であった。1440年12月1日にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアロイアル リーミントン スプアスト ジョン ス バプティスト'ス チャーチでEleanor de Throckmortonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1476年6月19日にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアファウスリーで50歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアファウスリーにて埋葬された。

ko.St John the Baptist, Royal Leamington Sp: 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 로야 리밍턴 스파 스트 존 테 바프티스트'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Richard Knightly III Of Fawsley(이)가 대략 1427년 영국 노르섬프토실르 파w슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Knightley Of Fawsley(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Purefoy(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1440년 12월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 로야 리밍턴 스파 스트 존 테 바프티스트'스 c후르치에서 Eleanor de Throckmorton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1476년 6월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 파w슬리에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 파w슬리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Knightly III Of Fawsley nasceu aproximadamente 1427, em Fawsley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Knightley Of Fawsley, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Purefoy, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor de Throckmorton em 1 de dezembro de 1440, em St John The Baptist's Church, Royal Leamington Spa, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 19 de junho de 1476, em Fawsley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Fawsley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Knightly III Of Fawsley родился около 1427 г. в местности фавсли, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Knightley Of Fawsley было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Purefoy, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor de Throckmorton 1 декабря 1440 г. в местности ст джон т баптист'с чурч, рояль лимингтон спа, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 19 июня 1476 г. в местности фавсли, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности фавсли, нортамптоншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Knightly III Of Fawsley nació aproximadamente 1427, en Fawsley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Knightley Of Fawsley, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Purefoy, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Eleanor de Throckmorton el 1 de diciembre de 1440, en St John The Baptist's Church, Royal Leamington Spa, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 19 de junio de 1476, en Fawsley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Fawsley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
